metadata.description: Polished AI agent skills for Claude Code — multi-model design review, code review, and consensus validation

plugins.name: tasteful-design
plugins.description: AI-powered design review with autodetected design contracts, narrative assessments, and self-contained HTML reports. 7 specialist agents, multi-screen SPA flow audit.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Multi-model PR code review with self-contained HTML reports. 7 agents (Claude + Codex + Gemini), confidence scoring, 3-tier degradation.

plugins.name: consensus
plugins.description: 3-model consensus validation with type-aware rubrics and HTML reports. Validate any conclusion, architecture, plan, timeline, idea, design, or security decision. Confidence-scored 1-10.
